name: Search
goal: Provide a search input with magnifier icon, clear button, optional keyboard shortcut hint, and a debounced change event.
description: Form-associated search input with shadow DOM layout. Renders a flex row: magnifier icon, native search input, clear button (visible when value is non-empty), optional spinner (loading state), and optional shortcut hint chip. Fires ce-search (debounced) on value change and ce-submit immediately on Enter. Attaches a document-level keydown listener for the optional shortcut attribute, skipping the handler when focus is inside another editable element.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name used when the element participates in a form.

props.name: value
props.description: Current search value. Synced to ElementInternals for form submission.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown in the input when empty.

props.name: shortcut
props.description: Optional keyboard shortcut string (e.g. "/" or "cmd+k"). When pressed outside of any input/textarea, focuses the search input. Also renders a hint chip.

props.name: loading
props.description: When true, replaces the clear button with an inline spinner.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input and prevents interaction.

props.name: debounce
props.description: Milliseconds to wait after the last keystroke before firing the ce-search event.

events.name: ce-search
events.description: Fired after the debounce delay on input change. Also fired immediately when the user clicks the clear button or presses Enter.

events.name: ce-submit
events.description: Fired immediately when the user presses Enter inside the search input.

cssVariables.name: --ce-surface-2
cssVariables.description: Input field background and shortcut chip background.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Icon, placeholder, clear button, spinner, and shortcut chip text color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-1
cssVariables.description: Gap between action items (spinner, clear, chip).

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Horizontal padding for the actions zone and shortcut chip.

cssVariables.name: --ce-focus-ring
cssVariables.description: Box shadow applied to the field and clear button on focus.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition
cssVariables.description: Transition for border, shadow, and button hover effects.

globalDependencies.purpose: Registers a keydown listener for the optional keyboard shortcut. Listener is attached on connectedCallback and removed on disconnectedCallback.

sideEffects.description: Attaches a document-level keydown listener for the shortcut feature.
sideEffects.reason: Keyboard shortcuts must intercept events at the document level to work regardless of where focus is in the page.

sideEffects.description: Uses a setTimeout for input debouncing.
sideEffects.reason: Prevents excessive ce-search events on rapid keystrokes.

a11y.notes: The internal <input type="search"> carries the implicit ARIA searchbox role. The clear button is a real <button> element with aria-label="Clear search". The shortcut hint chip is aria-hidden="true" (decorative). The loading spinner carries role="status" and aria-label="Loading". The document-level shortcut listener does not fire when focus is inside INPUT, TEXTAREA, SELECT, or contenteditable elements.

nondeterministicReason: timer side effect prevents byte-identical innerHTML across runs
